generations.content_context: Focus shifted toward architectural hardening, specifically moving agent lifecycle tasks to a dedicated job queue to prevent system bottlenecks. Major effort to align all plugins with an ESM-first architecture to ensure ecosystem compatibility and modularity.
generations.scene_or_viz_prompt: At the city center, a robust “Job Queue Operations Tower” channels activity from smaller “Agent Lifecycle Management Offices.” Data flow bridges connect these offices to the tower, streamlining task handling. The “ESM-Plugin Innovation District” features modular buildings with open facades, representing adaptable, future-proof plugins. Wide boulevards (data pathways) link the plugin district to the operations tower, ensuring seamless interaction. Labels: “Job Queue Operations Tower,” “Agent Lifecycle Offices,” “ESM Plugin Blocks.” Districts are clearly zoned: Process Automation (lifecycle), Modularity & Compatibility (plugins), and Central Routing (job queue).
generations.full_prompt:

Wide boulevards (data pathways) link the plugin district to the operations tower, ensuring seamless interaction.
